2. **WebFetch parallelism abysmal for a research session.** 35 WebFetch calls, 8.6% parallel ratio. Research is where batching pays off most — independent URLs fired one-at-a-time with 1-4s gaps each. Batching groups of 4-5 URLs would easily recover 30+ seconds per session.
3. **Memory file writes serial at close-out** — two independent Write calls separated by 8s. Minor, but the pattern is consistent.
